title: cedrus brevifolia
intro: Cedrus brevifolia, also known as the Atlas Cedar or Cyprus Cedar, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The essential oil extracted from the tree has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-fungal properties. The health benefits of Cedrus brevifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cedrus brevifolia include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
